name: AWP | 黑色魅影
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted with two stylized blue-magenta women over a grayscale background. \"They took comfort in each other's despair\"
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器采用了灰度背景辅以蓝色和洋红色进行了自定义涂装，描绘了两位具有独特韵味的女子。 “两人在绝望中相互安慰”
